products.title: Hydrating Rose Serum
products.description: Infused with organic damask rose water and hyaluronic acid, this serum deeply hydrates and plumps the skin for a dewy, ethereal glow.

products.title: Velvet Matte Crimson
products.description: A weightless, high-pigment lipstick that provides a bold crimson finish with a comfortable velvet texture that lasts all day.

products.title: Midnight Santal
products.description: An intoxicating blend of smoky sandalwood, spicy cardamom, and leather. A sophisticated scent designed for the enigmatic night.

products.title: Bakuchiol Night Oil
products.description: A natural, plant-based retinol alternative that smooths fine lines and improves skin elasticity without irritation while you sleep.

products.title: Golden Glow Highlighter
products.description: A fine-milled luminous powder that catches the light in all the right places, giving your skin a natural, sun-kissed radiance.

products.title: Citrus Bloom Eau
products.description: Bright notes of Sicilian lemon and bergamot meet a heart of jasmine and neroli for a fresh, uplifting daytime fragrance.

products.title: Vitamin C Brightener
products.description: Potent 15% Vitamin C serum that targets dark spots and uneven skin tone, revealing a brighter and more revitalized complexion.

products.title: Precision Brow Pencil
products.description: An ultra-fine tip allows for hair-like strokes, creating perfectly defined and naturally full brows with ease and precision.

products.title: Amber Woods Musk
products.description: A deep, warm fragrance featuring notes of golden amber, cedarwood, and white musk. Timeless, elegant, and grounding.

products.title: Hyaluronic Acid Plump
products.description: Multi-molecular weight hyaluronic acid that penetrates deep into the dermis to provide intense, multi-layer hydration.

products.title: Silk Finish Foundation
products.description: Breathable medium-coverage foundation that mimics the texture of real skin, leaving a seamless, soft-matte finish.

products.title: Rose & Neroli Mist
products.description: A delicate floral mist that combines the romance of Bulgarian rose with the honeyed sweetness of orange blossom neroli.

products.title: Deep Sea Mud Mask
products.description: Mineral-rich mud from the deep sea that detoxifies pores, removes impurities, and leaves skin feeling incredibly smooth.

products.title: Volume Boost Mascara
products.description: Get dramatic volume and length with a smudge-proof formula and a curved brush designed to coat every single lash.

products.title: Ocean Breeze Pour
products.description: Capturing the essence of the coast, this scent features salty sea air, aquatic accords, and a hint of sun-dried driftwood.

products.title: Niacinamide Control
products.description: A targeted treatment with 10% Niacinamide and Zinc to balance sebum production and reduce the appearance of enlarged pores.

products.title: Cream Blush Stick
products.description: A creamy, multi-use color stick that blends effortlessly into cheeks and lips for a natural, healthy flush of color.

products.title: Desert Rose Extract
products.description: An exotic fragrance inspired by the desert landscape, featuring spicy pink pepper, Turkish rose, and dark oud.

products.title: Ceramide Barrier Cream
products.description: A rich moisturizer packed with essential ceramides and fatty acids to repair the skin's moisture barrier and prevent dehydration.

products.title: Liquid Eyeliner Pro
products.description: Waterproof liquid eyeliner with a flexible felt tip for creating everything from subtle lines to bold, dramatic cat-eyes.

products.title: Vanilla Bourbon Scent
products.description: A cozy and indulgent fragrance blending Madagascar vanilla bean with a rich, boozy hint of oak-aged bourbon.

products.title: Squalane Facial Oil
products.description: 100% plant-derived squalane oil that mimics skin's natural oils to lock in moisture without clogging pores or feeling greasy.

products.title: Shimmer Eyeshadow
products.description: A high-impact shimmer eyeshadow with metallic pigments that deliver an intense, sparkling finish with just one swipe.

products.title: Tuscan Leather Mist
products.description: The smell of Italian luxury; rich notes of fine leather, raspberry, and saffron create a scent that is both primal and refined.

products.title: Gentle Jelly Cleanser
products.description: A pH-balanced jelly cleanser that removes makeup and daily grime while keeping skin's natural moisture levels intact.

products.title: Nude Lip Liner
products.description: The perfect neutral lip liner to define and contour your lips. Its creamy formula glides on and prevents lipstick bleeding.

products.title: White Jasmine Parfum
products.description: An elegant floral fragrance that celebrates the pure, nocturnal scent of night-blooming white jasmine and gardenia.

products.title: Retinol Renewal
products.description: Advanced 1% encapsulated retinol serum that speeds up cell turnover to visibly reduce the signs of aging and photo-damage.

products.title: Contour Palette
products.description: A versatile palette containing cool-toned contour shades and warm bronzers to sculpt and add dimension to your features.

products.title: Bergamot & Cedar
products.description: A fresh yet woody combination of sparkling bergamot, green ivy, and the earthy richness of Himalayan cedar.
